## Checklist
- [ ] Backend tests pass locally (`cd backend && npm test`)
- [ ] API tests pass (`cd api-tests && make smoke`)
- [ ] BDD scenarios pass (`cd api-tests-bdd && make smoke`)
- [ ] Code passes lint (`npm run lint` in backend & frontend)
- [ ] Coverage on new/changed code is ≥ 80%
- [ ] Updated docs / READMEs where behaviour changed
- [ ] No secrets or PII committed
